root_cause_previous_incomplete_validatio: The captured CURRENT-UI contract (tests/fixtures/google_flow_ui_contract/ui_contract.sanitized.json) that proves video-open -> detail -> More -> Download Project all succeed was produced by Playwright/CDP TRUSTED clicks in an isolated debug Chrome (.ai/experiments/aisandbox_extend_discovery/capture_ui_pass2.py). The Chrome extension flow-ui-driver.js drives the OPERATOR's live authenticated tab with content-script SYNTHETIC clicks (pointerdown/mousedown/up + .click()). Across three bounded zero-credit passes these synthetic clicks do NOT trigger Flow's React-Router navigation from a project video card into VIDEO_DETAIL; the card is located by exact media-resource id but the detail view never confirms. Download Project depends on being in VIDEO_DETAIL, so it fails downstream with DOWNLOAD_PROJECT_ITEM_NOT_FOUND. Hybrid attach now reaches the composer upload path (dispatch-shadow bug fixed) but the reference thumbnail does not render within the bounded poll window in the live tab. All three residual failures are the same class: live Flow UI does not respond to the driver's synthetic content-script clicks the way it responds to isolated trusted CDP/Playwright clicks.
surgical_fixes_proven_this_session: extension/background.js: FLOWUI_COMPOSER_ATTACH_FILE was swallowed by the generic startsWith('FLOWUI_') WS dispatch branch and routed to the plain content-script relay instead of the CDP file-chooser handler handleFlowUiComposerAttachFile. PROVEN by the error transition FLOWUI_NO_RESPONSE -> real attach attempt (REFERENCES_NOT_VISIBLE actual_total_count=0) after excluding it from the generic branch.

extension/flow-ui-driver.js: Download-Project 'More' matcher used a JS regex literal with a double-escaped backslash-s that matched a literal backslash-s, never whitespace. Corrected to a single-escaped whitespace class.

agent/services/google_flow_ui_driver.py: path-only composer attach read the reference count once immediately; upload thumbnails render asynchronously. Now polls the container count up to ~30s before failing closed.

extension/flow-ui-driver.js: exact-video-open removed the body.innerHTML fallback that could click ANY visible card containing an img/video (risk of opening a same-title/unrelated card); now requires the exact media-resource id in the clicked card's subtree, per contract requirement 'same-title/unrelated cards ignored'.

hybrid_exact_one.note: Composer upload path now reached (dispatch-shadow bug fixed) but reference thumbnail did not render in the live tab within the bounded poll window.

submit_boundary.note: Real Create boundary located; NO submit performed; legacy API generation lane not invoked.

exact_video_open.note: Exact card located by media-resource id; synthetic click did not drive React navigation into VIDEO_DETAIL. Trusted CDP/Playwright click on the same project (captured contract) does navigate.

typed_identifiers.invariants: missing fields remain null; media id NOT copied into primary_media_id; workflow id NOT renamed as operation id

download_project.note: Downstream of exact_video_open: without VIDEO_DETAIL the detail 'More' menu that hosts Download Project is not present. Fail-closed checks were NOT weakened to force a 200.

download_project_contract_reference_capt.note: Reference-only; proves the UI contract is real and achievable via trusted clicks. NOT presented as this session's live extension-driven proof.

automated_tests.locked_bundle: PASS (103 passed) — test_manual_lane_reroute, test_make_video_binding, test_agent_video, test_generate_validation, test_extension_side_panel_ui_contract

retries_and_recovery: 3 bounded zero-credit passes; reload-extension + reopen-project + reload-flow-tab between passes; backend force-restarted with FLOW_UI_DRIVER_ENABLED=1 to load the async-thumbnail poll fix.
blocker_summary: Live Flow UI does not respond to the extension driver's content-script synthetic navigation clicks (card->detail, detail More menu). Making exact-video-open, Download Project, and Hybrid-attach pass live would require routing those clicks through the extension's CDP trusted-click path as a new coordinate-discovery navigation subsystem — a rebuild beyond surgical scope — and continued live-Flow interaction debugging, which the repo contract (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md) forbids. Credits unchanged (1560 -> 1560).
owner_controlled_next_step: Owner decision required: authorize wiring the extension's existing CDP trusted-click helper (cdpClickCoordinate) into a coordinate-discovery navigation path for the video card, detail More menu, and Download Project menuitem — the isolated Playwright/CDP capture proves those actions succeed with trusted clicks. This is a scoped follow-up subsystem, not a surgical patch, and needs explicit approval per the Engineering Lockdown.
